name: aka-seo-wireframe
author: lebtiga
description: Generate 200+ page authority site content using the Authority-Knowledge-Answer (AKA) framework. Platform-agnostic — works with WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, static sites, or any CMS. WordPress deploy is optional.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Required for content generation via claude-opus-4. Uses your agent's existing Anthropic API key. Estimated cost ~$2-8 per hub.

WP_URL.description: Optional. Your WordPress site URL. Only needed for the optional WordPress deploy step.

WP_USER.description: Optional. WordPress username. Only needed for WordPress deploy step. Use a dedicated Editor-role account.

WP_PASS.description: Optional. WordPress Application Password (not your login password). Generate at WP Admin → Users → Profile → Application Passwords.

assets.description: Optional WordPress theme ZIP with all PHP template files (functions.php, header.php, footer.php, index.php, page-authority-hub.php, page-knowledge.php, page-answer.php, style.css).

warnings: All AI-generated content must be reviewed before publishing.
For legal, medical, or financial verticals: qualified professional review required before publishing.
WordPress deploy: use --dry-run first, test on staging before production.
Business config (name, phone, email) will be sent to Anthropic API for content generation.
